'''L'pwacc Den''' was one of [[Selonia/Legends|Selonia's]] underground cities. It contained a [[L'pwacc Den Port|spaceport]]. During the early [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] it was the site of large-scale rioting after the [[New Republic Advisory Council]] voted to redirect a fleet from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] to [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]].
